SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-13-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-13-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIF SILVANA TOBIA-MARCO, DEFENDANT JAMES RILEY AND DEFENDANT'S REPRESENTATIVE MIKHAIL BUTENKO, GENERAL MANAGER FOR ARMADA SECURITY. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE, BUT DEFENDANTS WAIVED SERVICE AT THIS AFTERNOON'S HEARING. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. PROCEEDINGS NOT REPORTED. (D506).
(SC-108)ANSWER TO REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT ARMADA SECURITY
DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFF RE: RESET OF TRIAL TO ALLOW MORE TIME FOR SERVICE. FILED BY PLAINTIFF TOBIA-MARCO, SILVANA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TOBIA-MARCO, SILVANA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ARMADA SECURITY RILEY, JAMES THE EVIDENCE DOES NOT SUPPORT THAT PLAINTIFF'S INJURY, IF ANY, WAS CAUSED BY AN ACT OR OMISSION OF THE DEFENDANTS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO J. RILEY ON 09/18/17. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO J. RILEY ON 09/18/17. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
